headline: Kyran Thompson
body: Kyran Thompson is set to stay at Arsenal; no exit is planned at this stage.
text:
🚨 Talks continue between Arsenal and England U17 winger Kyran Thompson over new deal.

No agreement yet but talks remain ongoing ahead of the expiration of his current deal on 30 June.

Arsenal are keen to secure the future of one of England’s most highly-rated young talents. Several clubs are monitoring the situation as they await the player’s decision.
draft_caption:
Unconfirmed report
RUMOUR | Kyran Thompson

Kyran Thompson is set to stay at Arsenal; no exit is planned at this stage.

#FPLVortex #Transfers #Arsenal #PremierLeague
